_comment.name: HDC DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: COM2008P. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B112B.name: Windscreen wiping or washing controls fault

B1182.name: Windscreen wiping or washing controls fault

B1183.name: Fault on the button at the end of the wipers stalk

B1184.name: Fault on the button at the end of the lights stalk

B126E.name: Cruise control and speed limiter switch fault

B1837.name: Fault in communication with the transponder

B1838.name: Integral controls steering wheel ECU supply fault

U1F03.name: Fault: no communication with the built-in systems interface .

U1F0F.name: Fault: ECU not communicating on the CAN

U1F2A.name: Fault: absence of communication with the integral controls steering wheel ECU
